tier_rules.I: parity-clean and <=1.5x C full-parse, cold <=5ms, blob <=150KB
tier_rules.III: parity-clean and (>8x C or cold >20ms or blob >400KB)
tier_rules.IV: not parity-clean (any divergence vs the C oracle, or unmeasured)
